name: Decision Logic Recorded
description: Each AI output documents the decision-making logic and reasoning behind it (explainability).
rationale: IOSCO Table 6.4: records that explain how AI systems generate outputs, including decision-making logic and reasoning, tailored for the relevant stakeholders.

examples.fails: an AI Output with no recorded decision logic

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
